description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige or taupe fabric. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, complemented by two smaller, square side pillows for added comfort. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's rectangular silhouette. The legs are slim, metallic, and slightly angled, providing a subtle elevation and a contemporary touch. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, maintaining the clean lines of the overall design. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, loose cushions, and slim metallic legs. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with smooth, matte upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, two side pillows, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the slim metallic legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the arrangement of cushions, armrest profile, and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, with two smaller square side pillows; all cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, medium-height padded armrests integrated into the sofa's rectangular frame, with a simple, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, metallic legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, uniform back cushions; the backrest is continuous and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
